data.title: Agent of "1011 Insider Whale": Market Bets on "Peaceful Trade," Hormuz Risk Remains Unresolved
data.description: Garrett Jin, an agent for "1011 Insider Whale," wrote that the market is currently pricing in "peaceful expectations," driving up risk assets, but this is diverging from the supply and demand situation in the energy market. He pointed out that while the S&P 500 hit a record high, Brent crude oil prices rebounded to around $103. Previously, hedge funds had heavily shorted crude oil, with Goldman Sachs data showing a short-to-long ratio that once reached 7.6:1. The conditions upon which the current market rally depends—the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, a decline in oil prices, falling inflation, and a Fed rate cut—have not yet materialized, and the gap between forward earnings expectations and actual earnings has widened to its highest level since 2021.

data.title: Islamabad Faces Frustration Amid Prolonged Lockdown for US-Iran Peace Talks
data.description: Businesses and residents in Islamabad are expressing growing frustration over the city's extended lockdown. Bloomberg posted on X that roads, schools, and offices have been closed for weeks as authorities maintain security restrictions. The measures are in place with the aim of facilitating further US-Iran peace talks. The prolonged lockdown has disrupted daily life, causing inconvenience to the local population.

data.title: Market Pricing Peace Expectations Amid Asset Divergence
data.description:
Garrett Jin, an agent for '1011 Insider Whale,' stated that the current market is pricing in 'peace expectations,' which is driving up risk assets. According to Odaily, this trend is diverging from the supply and demand situation in the energy market.

Jin highlighted that while the S&P 500 Index has reached an all-time high, Brent crude oil prices have rebounded to approximately $103. Previously, hedge funds had significantly shorted oil, with Goldman Sachs data showing a short-to-long ratio of 7.6:1 at one point. The market's current rise relies on conditions such as the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, a drop in oil prices, decreased inflation, and Federal Reserve rate cuts, none of which have been realized. The gap between forward earnings expectations and actual earnings has risen to its highest level since 2021.

data.title: European Companies Anticipate Q1 Earnings Growth of 3.2%, LESG Data Shows
data.description: European companies are expected to report a 3.2% increase in first-quarter earnings, according to LESG data. This is an improvement from the 2.8% growth anticipated a week earlier. According to Jin10, revenue growth for the first quarter is projected to remain steady at 0.4%, consistent with expectations from the previous week.

data.title: Eurozone PMI Decline Signals Economic Stagnation Amid Iran Conflict, Berenberg Bank Reports
data.description: On April 23, Berenberg Bank reported that weak PMI data from the Eurozone indicates a temporary halt in economic growth due to the ongoing conflict in Iran. According to Jin10, the composite PMI fell from 50.7 to 48.6 in April, marking the lowest level since November 2024. Inflation-induced uncertainty and reduced consumer purchasing power have particularly impacted the services sector. While the manufacturing PMI appears stable, the positive momentum is primarily driven by advance orders anticipating future supply bottlenecks. Additionally, longer delivery times have inflated the PMI, as they typically suggest high demand. However, these circumstances are currently attributed to supply shocks, making them unfavorable rather than beneficial.

data.title: CC will soon be listed on Bitget Launchpool, unlocking 1.8 million CC by locking up BGB, USDGO, and CC.
data.description: Bitget Launchpool will soon list the project Canton (CC), with a total prize pool of 1,800,000 CC. The staking channel will be open from April 24th, 18:00 to May 1st, 18:00 (UTC+8). This Launchpool round includes 3 staking pools: BGB Staking Pool: Total airdrop amount: 1,540,000 CC; VIP user staking limit: 50,000; Regular user staking limit: 5,000 BGB; USDGO Staking Pool: Total airdrop amount: 130,000 CC; Individual staking limit: 500,000 USDGO; CC Staking Pool: Total airdrop amount: 130,000 CC; Individual staking limit: 3,000,000 CC.

data.title: Market Faces Challenges as Mediocre Players Exit
data.description: The industry is experiencing a challenging growth phase, leading to the exit of many mediocre market makers and 'tourist' investors. According to PANews, those remaining are primarily deep participants.

data.title: Web3's Shift Away from Extreme Transparency by 2026
data.description:
By 2026, the Web3 landscape is expected to move away from its current emphasis on extreme transparency. According to PANews, this shift is driven by the need for greater privacy and security in digital interactions. As the Web3 ecosystem evolves, stakeholders are recognizing the importance of balancing transparency with user confidentiality.

The current model of extreme transparency in Web3 has raised concerns about data privacy and security. Users and developers are increasingly aware of the potential risks associated with exposing too much information on decentralized platforms. This awareness is prompting a reevaluation of how transparency is implemented in Web3 technologies.

Experts suggest that by 2026, Web3 platforms will adopt more sophisticated privacy measures. These measures aim to protect user data while maintaining the decentralized nature of the ecosystem. The focus will be on creating a secure environment that fosters trust among users without compromising their privacy.

The transition towards a more balanced approach to transparency is seen as a necessary step for the sustainable growth of Web3. As the industry matures, it is expected to develop new protocols and technologies that prioritize user privacy alongside transparency. This evolution is anticipated to enhance user experience and broaden the appeal of Web3 applications.

In conclusion, the future of Web3 is likely to see a shift towards a model that values both transparency and privacy. This change is driven by the growing demand for secure and private digital interactions, which are essential for the continued development and adoption of Web3 technologies.

data.title: American Airlines Adjusts Q2 Earnings Outlook
data.description: American Airlines has revised its second-quarter earnings outlook, projecting an adjusted earnings per share (EPS) ranging from -$0.2 to $0.2. According to Jin10, this adjustment contrasts with the market expectation of -$0.09 per share.

data.title: American Airlines Q1 Revenue Exceeds Expectations
data.description: American Airlines reported its first-quarter revenue at $13.912 billion, surpassing market expectations of $13.794 billion. According to Jin10, the airline's financial performance in the first quarter indicates a stronger-than-anticipated recovery in the aviation sector.

data.title: Comcast Reports Higher Than Expected Q1 Revenue
data.description: Comcast reported its first-quarter revenue at $31.46 billion, surpassing market expectations of $30.42 billion. According to Jin10, the company's financial performance exceeded analysts' forecasts, highlighting its strong market position.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Meta Platforms Introduces New AI Well-being Advisory Board
data.description: Meta Platforms has announced the formation of a new Artificial Intelligence Well-being Advisory Board. According to Jin10, the board's members will provide expert guidance as the company develops valuable and age-appropriate AI experiences for teenagers. This initiative aims to ensure that AI technologies are designed with the well-being of young users in mind.

data.title: Bitcoin Options Traders Anticipate Move Toward $80,000 Amid Expiring Contracts
data.description: Bitcoin options traders are preparing for a potential move toward $80,000 as $8.6 billion in contracts are set to expire on Friday. According to NS3.AI, analysts Nathan Batchelor and Antoine Lours have observed that aggressive hedging and increased demand for later-dated puts indicate a lack of confidence among traders in a sustained rally.

data.title: Binance BTC saw a short-term price difference of nearly 1% between futures and spot prices.
data.description: According to market data, there was a significant price difference between Binance BTC/USDT futures and spot prices for a short period, reaching a high of about $700, before quickly narrowing and the price has now rebounded to $77,365.

data.title: IMF Confident in UAE's Economic Resilience Amid Regional Tensions
data.description: The International Monetary Fund's (IMF) Middle East Director, Jihad Azour, expressed confidence in the United Arab Emirates' (UAE) ability to withstand economic shocks stemming from the ongoing conflict in Iran. Bloomberg posted on X that Azour conveyed this assurance during an interview with @joumannatv. This statement comes in the wake of U.S. President Donald Trump's announcement that a currency swap with the UAE is being considered. The potential currency swap aims to bolster economic stability in the region amid escalating tensions. Azour emphasized the UAE's robust economic framework, which he believes positions the nation to effectively manage external economic pressures. The IMF's support underscores the strategic importance of the UAE in maintaining regional economic stability.

data.title: Ripple's Swell 2026 to Return to New York with XRPL Apex Integration
data.description: Ripple has announced that Swell 2026 will be held in New York from October 27 to 29, marking the first time XRPL Apex will be included in the program. According to NS3.AI, the event aims to bring together industry leaders and innovators to discuss advancements in blockchain technology. Ripple has opened speaker applications as of April 14, and registration for the event is now available.

data.title: Crypto-Related Stocks Decline in U.S. Pre-Market Trading
data.description: U.S. pre-market trading saw a broad decline in crypto-related stocks. According to NS3.AI, SBET experienced a drop of 3.08%, while other stocks such as COIN, Strategy, HOOD, MARA, CRCL, and ABTC also traded lower.

data.title: Ethereum Price Movements Could Trigger Significant Liquidations
data.description: Ethereum's price fluctuations are poised to impact liquidation levels significantly. According to ChainCatcher, data from Coinglass indicates that if Ethereum surpasses $2,426, the cumulative short liquidation intensity across major centralized exchanges could reach $1.056 billion. Conversely, if Ethereum falls below $2,218, the cumulative long liquidation intensity could amount to $365 million.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ether Experience Declines Amid Rising Oil Prices
data.description: Bitcoin's value decreased by 0.7% since midnight UTC, reaching $77,600 on Thursday after struggling to surpass the $80,000 mark. According to NS3.AI, this decline comes as oil prices increased by 1.5%, reaching $103 per barrel, following reports of the U.S. seizing three Iranian tankers in Asian waters. Meanwhile, Ether also saw a decline, dropping 2.5% to $2,320.

data.title: UK April PMI Indicates Higher Cost Pressures, Says Capital Economics
data.description: On April 23, Jin10 reported that Capital Economics noted the preliminary PMI survey for April in the UK indicates higher-than-expected cost pressures faced by businesses. This aligns with the Consumer Price Index (CPI) peaking at approximately 5.0%. According to Jin10, the PMI data suggests stronger-than-expected economic performance, with the composite PMI rising to 52.0 in April from 50.3 in March. This may cause some Bank of England policymakers to be more concerned about the risks of high inflation rather than the risks of slowing economic growth. However, the strong PMI might reflect pre-war momentum and stockpiling behavior, suggesting that future economic activity could still weaken.
